title: PARENT-ACTIVITY — baby Sara is born, hospital
prompt: Soft pastel hospital recovery room with pink balloons and blue blanket. @young_Mama in a hospital bed in a soft white nightgown, holding @baby_Sara to her chest. @young_Papa sits on the edge of the bed beside her, gazing softly at the baby. Mouth SMILES exhausted-happy, eyes FULL of tears of joy. tiny eyes SLOWLY OPEN for the first time. young_Mama (whispered): "Hi, little one." young_Papa (soft warm tears in voice): "Welcome to the world."
